---
id: list-actions
title: "List actions for a Profile"
description: "Returns all actions defined on a Profile, sorted by condition then executionOrder."

hide_title: true

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"List actions for a Profile"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/api/profiles/{profileId}/actions"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Returns all actions defined on a Profile, sorted by condition then executionOrder.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
